_comment: Copy to env.json and fill in. Run with --dart-define-from-file=env.json. env.json is gitignored. These are client config values, not secrets: real security comes from Firestore rules and Cloud Functions, not from hiding them.
_comment_keys: Firebase issues one API key per platform and restricts each one — the browser key by HTTP referrer, the mobile keys by bundle id. Sending the web key from a phone is rejected, so fill in the per-platform keys too. Get them with: firebase apps:sdkconfig IOS|ANDROID <app-id>
_comment_app_ids: Per-platform app ids from Firebase console > Project settings > Your apps. FIREBASE_APP_ID is the web fallback.
_comment_google: Web client id is what Firebase Auth > Google shows as 'Web SDK configuration'. iOS client id is the iOS OAuth client.
_comment_link: Domain baked into check-in QR codes. Defaults to <FIREBASE_PROJECT_ID>.web.app; set only after connecting a custom domain to Firebase Hosting.
